question: What is the capital of France?

reward.title: Windsor Castle
reward.description: A royal residence in the charming town of Windsor. The oldest and largest occupied castle in the world, with stunning views of the River Thames.

reward.title: LEGOLAND Windsor
reward.description: A fantastic amusement park built around LEGO. Perfect for families with over 55 million LEGO bricks used in the attractions!

reward.title: Ascot Racecourse
reward.description: Famous horse racing venue known worldwide. Host to the Royal Ascot, one of the most prestigious horse racing events in the world.

reward.title: Runnymede
reward.description: Historic meadow where the Magna Carta was signed in 1215. A beautiful riverside location with monuments and walking trails.
